# OS_CLOCK_MACH_ABSOLUTE_TIME

**Enumeration Case**

Units relative to Mach absolute time value.

## Declaration

```swift
OS_CLOCK_MACH_ABSOLUTE_TIME
```

## Discussion

Specify a time relative to the value that the `mach_current_time` function returns.
title: OS_CLOCK_MACH_ABSOLUTE_TIME
